task.title: How to Divide using JPS Calculater
task.shortdesc: Follow the below steps to devide two or more numbers using the JPS Calculator.

prereq.p:
Make sure that:
You know what is division and its symbol.

step.cmd: Enter the numbers that you want to divide with the ÷ symbol between them.

result.p: You can see a single number on the JPS Calculator screen. This number is the result.

taskbody.example: Enter 100 ÷ 2 ÷ 2 and press =. You can see 25 on the JPS Calculator screen.
